title: Google’s Internal Politics Leave It Playing Catch-Up on AI Coding
snippet: At Google, leaders are anxious about falling behind in the race to offer AI coding tools, especially as rivals like Anthropic PBC offer more effective and popular tools to businesses, according to people familiar with t…
contentText: At Google, leaders are anxious about falling behind in the race to offer AI coding tools, especially as rivals like Anthropic PBC offer more effective and popular tools to businesses, according to people familiar with the matter. The search giant is now working to unite some of its coding initiatives under one banner to speed progress and take advantage of a surge in customer interest.

title: Pooja Malik on Oil Shock and EM Strategy
snippet: Nipun Capital CIO Pooja Malik warned that a Strait of Hormuz blockade and $100 oil could spike U.S. inflation by 90 basis points, severely impacting emerging markets. Managing a $2 billion portfolio, she anticipates a o…
contentText: Nipun Capital CIO Pooja Malik warned that a Strait of Hormuz blockade and $100 oil could spike U.S. inflation by 90 basis points, severely impacting emerging markets. Managing a $2 billion portfolio, she anticipates a one- to two-month disruption would hit EM equities hardest while keeping the Fed in a cautious stance. To navigate this volatility, Malik favors structural investments in China, AI supply chains, and Saudi upstream oil, though she remains wary of broad South Asia exposure. Despite the tactical shift toward fossil fuels during the crisis, she maintains that structural demand for clean energy remains a vital long-term driver. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Next Steps as CEO Tim Cook Prepares to Step Down
snippet: Apple announced Monday that Tim Cook would be replaced as Chief Executive Officer by John Ternus in September, bringing an end to Cook’s 15-year leadership of the company. Ed Ludlow looks at the timeline to September an…
contentText: Apple announced Monday that Tim Cook would be replaced as Chief Executive Officer by John Ternus in September, bringing an end to Cook’s 15-year leadership of the company. Ed Ludlow looks at the timeline to September and what lies ahead for the company on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
